Notes: ISO to be converted to SAS format. The date of revocation won't be stored if withdrawal is also requested. Date withdrew consent will not be populated if the participant also requested data destruction on the same date. Default variable (default is an empty string). Previously added on 6/21/23; Updated notes: The data destruction, withdrawal, and revocation dates are populated hierarchically (data destruction > withdrawal > revocation). Withdrawal includes HIPAA revocation and takes precedence over revocation; if both occur on the same date, only the withdrawal date is populated. If data destruction is requested on the same date as withdrawal, withdrawal date is not populated; only data destruction requested date is populated. If data destruction is requested later than withdrawal or revocation, multiple dates are populated with their respective timestamps (4/2/26)
